CAPE loaded PLGA nanoparticles were prepared using the oil in water (o/w) single emulsion solvent evaporation methods. Five
different processing parameters including initial CAPE amount, initial PLGA amount, PVA concentration in aqueous phase, PVA
volume, and solvent type were screened systematically to improve encapsulation of hydrophobic CAPE molecule, simultaneously
minimize particle size, and raise the reaction yield. Obtained results showed that the encapsulation efficiency of the nanoparticles
